ACTION7 had no impact at all. The board is identical. Let me go back to basics and understand the current state.
Current state:
- Blue blob: 69 pixels at (23, 31)
- Purple 3x3 square: 9 pixels at (34, 39) - this is a grabber/reacher
- Magenta 2x2 square: 4 pixels at (53, 48)
- 2 sky blue dots: at (55, 14) and (57, 16)
The purple 3x3 square at (34, 39) is between the blob and the magenta square. It seems like the blob extended a "grabber" toward the magenta square.
Looking at the positions:
- Blob center: roughly (27, 33)
- Purple grabber: (34, 39) - southeast of blob
- Magenta square: (53, 48) - further southeast
So the grabber moved from the blob toward the magenta square. But it hasn't reached it yet.
Maybe I need to click somewhere to make the grabber extend further, or click on the magenta square to pull it toward the grabber.
Let me try clicking on the magenta square at (53, 48) again, but this time with intent='solve' since I believe this is the right approach.

</parameter>
